summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vendor Management module and Raw Materials filters. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_UI_Vendor during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Management and RM Filters fully tested. 504 vendors in system with VND_XXX format IDs. 2402 raw materials with column-based filters (Category, Type, Model, Colour, Brand). Pagination working at 100 items per page.

features_tested.vendor_list_api: PASS - GET /api/vendors returns 504 vendors with VND_XXX format IDs
features_tested.vendor_create_api: PASS - POST /api/vendors creates vendor with auto-generated VND_XXX ID
features_tested.vendor_details_api: PASS - GET /api/vendors/{id} returns vendor with RM prices
features_tested.vendor_rm_price_by_rm_api: PASS - GET /api/vendor-rm-prices/by-rm/{rm_id} returns vendors for RM
features_tested.rm_filter_options_api: PASS - GET /api/raw-materials/filter-options returns categories, types, models, colours, brands
features_tested.rm_filtered_pagination_api: PASS - GET /api/raw-materials/filtered returns paginated results (100 per page)
features_tested.rm_search_api: PASS - search parameter filters by RM ID
features_tested.rm_pagination_navigation_api: PASS - page navigation returns different items
features_tested.rm_filter_reset_api: PASS - clearing filters returns all items
features_tested.vendor_management_ui: PASS - Page loads with 504 vendors, VND_XXX IDs visible
features_tested.vendor_add_ui: PASS - Add Vendor dialog with all fields works
features_tested.vendor_add_price_ui: PASS - Add RM Price dialog with RM search works
features_tested.vendor_price_comparison_tab_ui: PASS - Price Comparison tab shows lowest prices
features_tested.vendor_template_export_buttons_ui: PASS - Template, Export, Bulk Upload buttons present
features_tested.rm_page_ui: PASS - Raw Materials page shows 2402 total items
features_tested.rm_filters_panel_ui: PASS - Filter panel with Category, Type, Model, Colour, Brand dropdowns
features_tested.rm_search_ui: PASS - Search by RM ID works
features_tested.rm_pagination_ui: PASS - Pagination with Previous/Next buttons works
